header.title: Tech Lead | Java Full Stack Developer
header.description: I am a Java Developer and Technical Lead with Full Stack experience, focused on building robust and efficient solutions. Currently, I work at BrTec as a developer, where I was hired after my internship and continue improving my skills using modern development technologies.

about.title: About Me
about.paragraph1: I have strong expertise in Java (Spring Boot, Hibernate), but I also have relevant experience with other languages and frameworks such as Python, Node.js (Next.js), and PHP. This versatility allows me to adapt to different challenges and work on both front-end and back-end development.
about.paragraph2: My professional background includes solid experience in management and coordination, acquired through leadership roles in commercial and administrative sectors. These experiences provided me with strategic vision and interpersonal skills that I now apply in my career as a software developer.

degrees.title: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science
degrees.description: Focused on algorithms, data structures, networks, and software development.

brtec.description: Joined as a software development intern in 2023 and became a full-time employee in 2024. Works on system development and maintenance using modern backend and frontend technologies.

itau.description: Started experience in the financial sector, gaining knowledge about financial products, investment funds, and the structure of public and private institutions, while also developing sales techniques and client relationship skills.

plansul.description: Worked with administrative process organization, operational data analysis, and institutional support routines at the Court of Justice of Minas Gerais.

comercio.description: Responsible for team coordination and operational activity management, developing leadership, communication, and process organization skills.

assprom.description: Beginning of professional career providing services to the Court of Justice of Minas Gerais, developing professional discipline, organization, and understanding of public institutions.
